lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior and interior show no signs of wear. All mechanical and electrical systems are in perfect working order.
The car is in fair condition.
This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor blemishes, and the interior shows light wear from regular use. All mechanical components are in working order.

Experience automotive perfection with this absolute gem! This car is in showroom condition, featuring a flawless exterior and an interior that looks and feels brand new. Meticulously cared for and maintained to the highest standards, it drives like it just rolled off the assembly line. This is a rare find for a buyer who demands the very best!

This vehicle is in fair condition. It remains mechanically reliable and suitable for daily use, though it shows clear signs of age and wear. The exterior has several visible scuffs and minor paint chips, while the interior shows some fading and minor stains on the seats. It is a functional and dependable car for a buyer who values mechanical integrity over cosmetic appearance.

This vehicle is in pristine, showroom condition and has been meticulously cared for since day one. The exterior paint is flawless with a deep shine and absolutely no scratches, dents, or chips. Inside, the cabin remains in like-new condition, featuring premium materials that show zero signs of wear and all electronic features functioning perfectly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, with a comprehensive service history and an engine that performs exactly as it did the day it left the factory. This is a rare find for a collector or a buyer seeking a vehicle that is indistinguishable from new.

We are proud to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard and presented in showroom condition. Every detail, from the flawless paintwork to the immaculate interior, reflects a level of preservation rarely seen on the market. This represents a premier acquisition for the discerning buyer who demands perfection in both aesthetics and mechanical integrity.

Hey there! I’m absolutely in love with this ride, but it’s time for it to find a new home. Honestly, it’s in such incredible shape—it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied it since day one, so you’re getting a total gem that’s ready for the road. Seriously, it's pristine. Come check it out, you won't be disappointed!

Presenting a collector-grade 2001 BMW M3 (E46) in iconic Laguna Seca Blue. This example features the S54B32 3.2L inline-six, a masterpiece of engineering equipped with individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing, delivering an 8,000 RPM redline. Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Clean title. Maintenance records available.

Presenting a rare opportunity to own a vehicle in truly showroom-equivalent condition. This car has been curated with obsessive attention to detail, spending its life in a climate-controlled environment and seeing pavement only on perfect weather days. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, free of even the slightest swirl marks or stone chips. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium leather remains supple and matte, still carrying that distinct new-car aroma, while every button and switch operates with factory-crisp precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, backed by a complete, chronological service history performed exclusively by master technicians. With zero modifications and all original accessories included, this is a collector-grade specimen that drives with the same tightness and vigor as the day it was delivered. For the buyer who accepts nothing less than perfection, this vehicle stands as the definitive example of the model.

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, preserved in impeccable showroom condition. Every aspect of this specimen, from its lustrous factory finish to its pristine, wear-free interior, reflects an uncompromising standard of care. Mechanically flawless and rigorously vetted, this is a distinguished offering for those who demand excellence without exception.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This specimen remains in pristine condition, offering a flawless aesthetic and mechanical integrity that mirrors its original showroom delivery. A rare opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a vehicle of peerless quality and distinction.

Hey there! You have seriously got to see this absolute beauty. It is in such incredible shape, you’d honestly think it just rolled right off the showroom floor! I’ve taken such good care of it—pristine interior, sparkling paint, and it drives like an absolute dream. It’s definitely the one you’ve been looking for. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

Pristine condition. Flawless interior and exterior. Single owner. Full service records included. No accidents.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence, maintained to a standard rarely seen on the secondary market. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, having been meticulously garage-kept and professionally detailed throughout its ownership. The exterior paint retains its deep, factory luster with absolutely no swirls, chips, or imperfections, while the wheels are completely free of curb rash. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium leather upholstery remains supple and matte, showing no signs of bolster wear or creasing, and it still carries that distinctive new-car aroma. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the climate control, functions exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, boasting a documented, comprehensive service history and a powertrain that delivers smooth, effortless performance. This is a collector-grade vehicle suited for the most discerning buyer who demands nothing short of perfection.

This exceptional vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Meticulously maintained and presented in showroom condition, it features a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance, offering a driving experience that meets the most exacting standards of the discerning collector.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit represents a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and absolute mechanical integrity. Every surface and component reflects a rigorous commitment to preservation. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this vehicle stands as a benchmark of its class.

Hey there! You've gotta see this absolute beauty. It’s in seriously incredible shape—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've taken such good care of it, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you're looking for something that's practically brand new and meticulously maintained, this is the one for you. Come take it for a spin, you won't be disappointed!

Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Flawless interior and exterior. Full service history. Professional inspection welcome.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence, maintained to the highest standards of a discerning collector. This vehicle boasts a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like finish, protected by a premium ceramic coating and kept in a climate-controlled environment since day one. The interior remains in showroom state, featuring pristine leather upholstery that retains its original factory scent and shows absolutely zero signs of wear on the bolsters or touchpoints. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, with a comprehensive service history documenting every maintenance interval performed exclusively by certified specialists. Every component, from the smooth-shifting transmission to the responsive engine, operates exactly as it did when it left the factory. This is a rare opportunity to own a turnkey masterpiece that is equally ready for a cross-country tour or a prestigious local car show.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit displays a flawless exterior finish complemented by a pristine, showroom-quality interior. Mechanically superior and rigorously inspected, it represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection. Every detail of this vehicle affirms its status as a premier example of its class.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom-ready condition, reflecting a standard of care that satisfies even the most discerning collector. Every surface and mechanical component has been maintained to the highest degree of excellence, ensuring a driving experience indistinguishable from its original debut. We invite serious inquiries to acquire this masterfully preserved example of engineering and aesthetic perfection.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, it is a total dream. This car is in pristine, like-new condition—it honestly looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been meticulously loved, always garaged, and there isn't a single blemish to be found. It drives incredibly smoothly and is just waiting for someone who will appreciate it as much as I have. You’ve got to see this one in person!

Offering an investment-grade 2001 BMW M3 in impeccable condition. This E46 features the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a high-pressure VANOS variable valve timing system. The chassis is exceptionally rigid, with documented subframe reinforcement and a refreshed suspension geometry featuring Bilstein B16 dampers. Power is delivered to the rear wheels via a Getrag 6
Mint condition. Flawless paint. Showroom interior. Mechanically perfect. Full service records included.

This vehicle is presented in showroom-ready, pristine condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since its original purchase. The exterior boasts a deep-gloss, mirror-like finish entirely free of stone chips, swirl marks, or scratches, paired with curb-free alloy wheels. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium upholstery shows no signs of creasing or wear, and the interior retains its factory-fresh scent. Every electronic feature and driver-assist technology functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is in peak performance, supported by a comprehensive, up-to-date service history performed exclusively by certified technicians. This is a rare, collector-grade example that offers a tight, responsive driving experience exactly as intended by the manufacturer.

We are proud to present an exceptional example of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, having been preserved with the utmost care and attention to detail. Every surface, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior upholstery, reflects a standard of maintenance that is truly beyond reproach. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of uncompromising quality.
